publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-06-10 00:09:07 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Manuscripts, Newspapers, Printed Materials, Scrapbooks
did.abstract: Yearbooks, scrapbooks, albums containing clippings and programs from events, executive board files, and civic development project folders from the Ithaca Garden Club.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Founded in 1922, the Ithaca Garden Club is a longstanding member of the City Federation of Women's Organizations (CFWO) in Ithaca, NY.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Ithaca Garden Club records, #6881. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Yearbooks, scrapbooks, and albums containing clippings and programs from events, executive board files, annual reports, presidents' reports, and civic development project folders from the Ithaca Garden Club. Also, biographical sketches of Katharine Ziegler Heasley, Leona "Westy" Gelder, Jane E. Hardy, and Cele Kemple, various club histories, and Beatrice Szekely's civic development chronology with commentary.
